entities.name: 陈默
entities.description: Current host of the lamp. Has collected all five fragments. Has lost two emotions so far: fear and anger.

entities.name: 姜太初
entities.description: Previous host of the lamp. Gray-robed, white-haired old man. Lost four emotions: fear, anger, joy, sorrow. Chose to walk until he could go no further.

entities.name: 神秘老人
entities.description: An old man who has been searching for Jiang Taichu for many years. Found him too late.

entities.name: 灯
entities.description: The lamp within Chen Mo. Sentient enough to have reactions. The current lamp and the previous lamp (Jiang Taichu's) are implied to be the same entity.

entities.name: 穹顶
entities.description: A dome-shaped space with white light and a stone platform carved with ancient patterns. Meeting place between Chen Mo and Jiang Taichu.

entities.name: 碎片
entities.description: Five fragments that Chen Mo has collected. All five are now gathered.
